name: Chili Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chili seasoning with the cream cheese and salsa until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into a log form.
3. Top the log with chopped pecans and shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
4. Place the log in the refrigerator to chill until it becomes firm.
5. Once firm, decorate as desired.
6. Serve with various crackers and vegetables.
